telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Apr 10, 2026 Markets reflected a late-cycle tug-of-war today, with crypto surging on institutional flows while persistent inflation fears and geopolitical tensions kept traditional risk assets range-bound. The underlying narrative points to growing displacement risks as the goldilocks scenario fades and stagflationary pressures build beneath the surface. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $73,370 · ETH: $2,256 · SOL: $85.44 · GOLD: $4,760 · SPY: $679.46 (+0.5%) · QQQ: $611.07 (+0.8%) · VIX: $19.23 (-1.3%) · TLT: $86.49 (-0.5%) · DXY: $98.7 (-0.1%) · OIL: $95.63 (-2.3%) EVENING NEWS ▼ Ruth Judson: TIC data’s limitations hinder foreign investment insights, the Fed’s diminish ▲ Dmitry Tokarev: Many crypto projects are exceeding expectations, investors are shifting to ▲ Fed’s Daly: If inflation stays elevated, we would hold steady ▲ Bitcoin Surges Past $73,000 as Hot CPI Meets Fragile Ceasefire ▼ NYC’s Car Capital Stung by High Gas Prices, GOP Lawmaker Says ▼ Bitcoin Exchange Supply Drops as Shorts Increase Pressure SCENARIO SHIFTS ▲ Late Cycle: Crypto surge and inflation persistence suggest late-cycle dynamics strengthening ▼ Goldilocks: Inflation persistence and geopolitical tensions undermine balanced growth ▲ Stagflation: Hot CPI, energy price pressures, and Fed hawkish stance align with stagflationary forces ▼ Hegemony: Dollar weakness from Iran talks and data infrastructure gaps challenge US monetary dominance ▲ Displacement: Bitcoin institutional adoption and crypto infrastructure development accelerating REGIME CHECK ▲ Risk-On · Neutral · EXPANSION · Gauge: 0/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT US Unseasonally Adjusted Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Mar) — Apr 24, 06:30 PM UTC (prev: 2.4%) US New home sales (AAMR)(Feb) — Apr 20, 02:00 PM UTC (prev: -17.6%) EU Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Final)(Mar) — Apr 16, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 2.5%) EU Consumer Price Index (MoM)(Final)(Mar) — Apr 16, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: 1.2%) Total retail sales of consumer goods (YoY)(Mar) — Apr 16, 02:00 AM UTC (prev: 2.8%) GDP (QoQ)(Q1) — Apr 16, 02:00 AM UTC (prev: 1.2%) CONTRARIAN • Bitcoin's rally past $73k might be a liquidity-driven squeeze rather than genuine institutional adop • Fed's inflation concerns may be overblown as energy price spikes from geopolitical tensions are like agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
